string.text: GAMMA Weapon and Armor Selling Configuration
If enabled, this will hide any armor or weapons in a vendor's inventory.\n \nTurn this only if you are not using any mod that enables weapon and armor trading from vendors.
Turning this on will allow you to sell armor and headgear if they are above your Armor Condition Threshold setting below.

Turning this on will allow you to sell weapons if they are above your Weapon Condition Threshold setting below, and your weapon parts are above your "Sale parts condition minimum" setting in your Weapon Parts Overhaul MCM settings.
This is the minimum condition required in order to sell armors and headgear.
This is the minimum condition required in order to sell weapons.\n \nNOTE: GAMMA sets weapon condition to be at 83% - setting this higher than 83% will result in weapons becoming unable to be sold!!!
Price modifier for selling armor and headgear (0.5 = 50% base price).
Price modifier for selling weapons (0.5 = 50% base price).
Enabling this will print debug messages for this mod to the console and your logs. Disabling it will prevent all debug messages from this mod from showing in your console and your logs.
